seo.title: Basecamp Health Assessment | Beth Motley, MD
seo.description: A comprehensive, physician-led health evaluation and personalized lifestyle medicine plan. Go beyond the annual physical — get a deep-dive assessment with Dr. Motley.

hero.headline: Basecamp Health Assessment
hero.subheadline: A comprehensive, physician-led health evaluation for people who refuse to leave their most important asset to chance.

problem.title: Your Health Deserves More Than a 15-Minute Visit
problem.intro: You have world-class advisors for your finances, your legal strategy, and your business operations. But when it comes to your health (the foundation everything else depends on), most high-performers settle for annual physicals that catch problems only after they have already started.
problem.body: The Basecamp Health Assessment is built for people who want more than reactive care. It is a proactive, evidence-based deep dive with a physician who has the expertise to evaluate your health comprehensively and create a personalized lifestyle medicine plan for sustained performance, energy, and longevity. This is not a primary care or PCP relationship — it is a one-time comprehensive assessment with an actionable roadmap.

included.title: What's Included
included.subtitle: A comprehensive, physician-led health evaluation experience

items.title: Comprehensive Health Assessment
items.description: Advanced lab panels, cardiovascular screening, body composition analysis, and a thorough lifestyle evaluation that goes far beyond a standard physical.

items.title: Personalized Lifestyle Protocol
items.description: A tailored plan covering nutrition, exercise, sleep, and stress management, designed around your schedule, preferences, and goals rather than a one-size-fits-all template.

items.title: Direct Physician Access
items.description: Reach Dr. Motley directly via text or email for questions, adjustments, or guidance during the assessment process. No phone trees, no waiting rooms, no gatekeepers.

items.title: Detailed Health Report
items.description: Clear, detailed reporting that translates your data into actionable insights. Understand exactly where you stand, what needs attention, and what to focus on next.

items.title: Actionable Roadmap
items.description: Walk away with a concrete, step-by-step plan — not vague advice. Your roadmap covers exactly what to change, why it matters, and how to implement it in your real life.

items.title: Priority Scheduling
items.description: Same-week appointments when you need them. Your time is valuable, and the Basecamp Health Assessment is designed to respect it at every step.

whoThisIsFor.title: Who This Is For
whoThisIsFor.subtitle: The Basecamp Health Assessment is designed for a specific kind of person
paragraphs: This assessment is built for executives, business owners, physicians, attorneys, and other high-performing professionals who recognize that sustained success requires sustained health.

You may be managing the early signs of metabolic disease, navigating the health impacts of chronic stress, or simply unwilling to accept the standard approach of waiting until something breaks before paying attention. You want a physician who will invest the time to understand your life, your goals, and your risks, and build a plan that keeps you performing at your best for decades.

Please note: The Basecamp Health Assessment is not a primary care program. You will keep your current PCP. This is a deep-dive evaluation that gives you and your doctor a comprehensive picture of your health and a clear plan forward.

items.question: How is the Basecamp Health Assessment priced?
items.answer: The Basecamp Health Assessment is a one-time fee that covers your comprehensive evaluation, detailed health report, personalized lifestyle protocol, and follow-up consultation. Because this is a premium, in-depth assessment, it is not billed through insurance. We provide a detailed investment overview during your confidential consultation.

items.question: How much time does this require?
items.answer: Your comprehensive assessment takes approximately two to three hours. After that, you will receive your detailed report and actionable roadmap within two weeks, followed by a 60-minute review session to walk through everything together. The entire process is designed to fit into a demanding professional life, not add to it.

items.question: Is this a primary care or PCP relationship?
items.answer: No. The Basecamp Health Assessment is a comprehensive health evaluation, not an ongoing primary care relationship. You will keep your current primary care physician. Think of it as the most thorough health assessment you have ever had — one that gives both you and your PCP a clear, detailed picture of where you stand and exactly what to do next.

items.question: How is this different from concierge medicine?
items.answer: Concierge medicine practices offer ongoing access to a physician for reactive, symptom-based care. The Basecamp Health Assessment is fundamentally different: it is a proactive, prevention-focused deep dive built on the science of lifestyle medicine. Dr. Motley does not manage your day-to-day care — she conducts a comprehensive evaluation, identifies risks early, and creates a personalized evidence-based plan you can implement with your own physician.

items.question: Is my information kept confidential?
items.answer: Absolutely. All health information is protected under HIPAA. Your records are maintained with full privacy protections, and we never share your participation with anyone (including employers) without your explicit consent.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Complete the inquiry form below and a member of Dr. Motley's team will reach out within 48 hours to schedule a brief, confidential phone consultation. During that call, we will learn about your goals, answer your questions, and determine whether the assessment is the right fit. There is no obligation.

ctaForm.title: Request a Confidential Consultation
ctaForm.subtitle: Complete the form below and a member of Dr. Motley's team will reach out within 48 hours to schedule a private phone consultation.
